name: create_scriptable_object
description: Create a ScriptableObject asset in the project from a given type. The type must be a class that extends ScriptableObject and must already exist as a compiled script.

path.description: Optional. The folder path where the asset will be created. Defaults to 'Assets/Resources'.

file_name.description: Optional. The asset file name (without or with .asset extension). Defaults to the type name.
